name: Creamy Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vegetables: Grate 1 medium carrot and finely chop 1/2 small onion.
2. In a large salad bowl, combine the shredded green cabbage, grated carrot, chopped onion, lemon juice, eggless mayonnaise, caraway seeds, salt, and pepper.
3. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
4. Serve immediately.
